name: undo-redo
description: Undo/redo is strictly LIFO across every action type including markLucky (undo decrements the track by one field, redo re-applies through markLucky()); a fresh move after an undo clears the redo stack, exactly like every other action.

steps.note: undoes the green mark (LIFO - the most recent action)
undoes the second Lucky 15 field - crossed count decrements by exactly one
history is empty - nothing left to undo
re-applies the first Lucky 15 field through markLucky()
a FRESH forward move after undoing - this must clear the remainder of the redo stack
redo stack was cleared by the fresh blue mark - the green mark from before is gone forever
far below the >=5 lock threshold - illegal move, must not be recorded in history
the last APPLIED action is still the blue mark, not the refused yellow lock attempt
